description: A maxillofacial surgeon needs a 3D model of the skull with the lower anterior teeth digitally extracted to plan for immediate dentures. Using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan, create a 3D surface of the skull with the lower incisors and canines (approximately 6 front teeth) removed, ensuring the mandibular bone remains intact. Export a screenshot showing the front of the mandible to /home/ga/Documents/edentulous_view.png and export the modified 3D surface as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/edentulous_skull.stl.
